title: Godzilla
syn: The nuclear-age parable that started it all. Godzilla rises from the Pacific, devastating Tokyo. A masterwork of postwar Japanese horror.

title: Godzilla Raids Again
syn: Godzilla returns and battles Anguirus — the franchise's first monster vs. monster fight. Sets the template for kaiju combat.

title: King Kong vs. Godzilla
syn: Two legends clash. Toho's most commercially successful entry for decades. Color era begins.

title: Mothra vs. Godzilla
syn: Mothra defends humanity. One of the most emotionally resonant entries in the Shōwa era.

title: Ghidorah, The Three-Headed Monster
syn: King Ghidorah arrives from space. The monsters unite for the first time against a common cosmic threat.

title: Invasion of Astro-Monster
syn: Aliens from Planet X commandeer Godzilla. Alien invasion becomes a recurring franchise theme.

title: Ebirah, Horror of the Deep
syn: Godzilla awakens on an island fortress used by a terrorist organization. Lighter tone than previous entries.

title: Son of Godzilla
syn: Minilla introduced. Godzilla as protective father figure — the franchise's family-friendly pivot.

title: Destroy All Monsters
syn: All monsters assembled on Monster Island. Alien control. Ultimate Shōwa showdown.

title: All Monsters Attack
syn: A child's dream adventure. Controversial fan split — loathed or loved for its unique child-centric framing.

title: Godzilla vs. Hedorah
syn: Psychedelic anti-pollution horror. Hedorah — the Smog Monster — is one of the franchise's most original villains.

title: Godzilla vs. Gigan
syn: Gigan introduced. Alien cockroaches in disguise control the cyborg kaiju. Godzilla and Anguirus communicate via thought balloons.

title: Godzilla vs. Megalon
syn: Jet Jaguar debuts. Submarine civilisation Seatopia attacks. Camp classic.

title: Godzilla vs. Mechagodzilla
syn: Mechagodzilla revealed as an alien weapon disguised as Godzilla. Space titanium hull. King Caesar awakens.

title: Terror of Mechagodzilla
syn: Honda's final Godzilla film. Mechagodzilla upgraded with a human controller. Titanosaurus introduced. Melancholic finale.

title: Return of Godzilla
syn: Reboot. Cold War tensions as backdrop. Godzilla is a pure force of nature once more. Darker than Shōwa era.

title: Godzilla vs. Biollante
syn: G-cells spliced into a rose. Biollante — one of the franchise's most inventive and tragic creations.

title: Godzilla vs. King Ghidorah
syn: Time travel retcons Godzilla's origin. Ghidorah created by future humans as a bioweapon. Mecha-King Ghidorah.

title: Godzilla vs. Mothra
syn: Mothra and dark twin Battra battle Godzilla. Earth's original guardians face humanity's hubris.

title: Godzilla vs. Mechagodzilla II
syn: UN builds Mechagodzilla from salvaged parts. Baby Godzilla subplot provides emotional core.

title: Godzilla vs. SpaceGodzilla
syn: Cosmic clone born from Godzilla's cells in a black hole. Crystalline power. Junior in peril.

title: Godzilla vs. Destoroyah
syn: Godzilla's heart melts down. Nuclear death march. Tragic, operatic finale. Godzilla dies.

title: Godzilla 2000
syn: New millennium, clean slate. UFO alien absorbs G-cells to create Orga. Godzilla's atomic breath regenerated.

title: Godzilla vs. Megaguirus
syn: Alternate history Japan. Godzilla attacked by prehistoric dragonfly queen Megaguirus and her swarm.

title: GMK: Giant Monsters All-Out Attack
syn: Godzilla as a villain possessed by WWII victims' vengeful spirits. Ghidorah recast as a guardian. Kaneko's masterpiece.

title: Godzilla: Tokyo S.O.S.
syn: Sequel to Mechagodzilla 2002. Mothra demands Godzilla's remains. Mechagodzilla rebuilt. Interconnected lore.

title: Godzilla: Final Wars
syn: Every monster returns for the 50th anniversary. Maximum chaos. Godzilla battles all. Alien invasion. Epic send-off.

title: Shin Godzilla
syn: Post-Fukushima bureaucracy satire. Godzilla evolves in real time. Japan paralysed by red tape. Haunting and deeply original.

title: Godzilla (2014)
syn: MonsterVerse begins. Godzilla as nature's corrective force. MUTOs awaken. Ford Brody's journey. Slow-burn payoff.

title: Kong: Skull Island
syn: 1970s Apocalypse Now aesthetic. Kong established as Skull Island's Alpha. Hollow Earth mythology begins.

title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
syn: Eco-terrorists awaken all Titans. Ghidorah as alien usurper. Mothra sacrifices herself. Godzilla radiates Boston.

title: Godzilla vs. Kong
syn: Kong journeys to Hollow Earth. Mechagodzilla possessed by Ghidorah's skull goes rogue. Kong gets an axe.

title: Monarch: Legacy of Monsters S1
syn: Cold War Monarch history interleaved with present-day conspiracy. Kurt and Wyatt Russell. Family secrets and Titan emergence.

title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
syn: Deep Hollow Earth reveals ancient enslaved Titans. Skar King and frozen Shimo. Team-up to save both worlds.

title: Godzilla Singular Point
syn: Hard sci-fi anime. Godzilla as theoretical physics crisis. Dense, cerebral, and visually inventive.

title: Godzilla Minus One
syn: Post-WWII survivor guilt vs extinction-level threat. Academy Award for VFX. Emotionally devastating.

title: Godzilla: Planet of the Monsters
syn: Anime trilogy part 1. Humanity returns to an Earth dominated by a 300m Godzilla after 20,000 years.

title: Godzilla: The Planet Eater
syn: Anime trilogy finale. Void Ghidorah as cosmic annihilator beyond physics. Nihilistic conclusion.
